name: Lemon-Flavored Souzoukakia

ingredients.item: Souzoukakia are meatballs flavored with cumin and garlic and shaped like little sausages.
Combine meat, cumin, breadcrumbs, garlic, egg, salt, and pepper.
Shape teaspoonfuls of the meat mixture into oval or oblong shapes (wetting your hands to facilitate handling).
Fry in butter over medium heat, turning frequently.
Combine lemon juice and water and pour over the souzoukakia.
